objective: Seal the current Orin NX stage into a concise final evidence package: result table, device-side dataflow architecture, claim boundary, presentation wording, and control-plane routing.

entry_context.refined_project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative real-time vision workload.
entry_context.latest_device_dataflow_result: Format-matched NvBuffer pair preserves the resid_r15_s07 quality anchor and gives a small measured device-stage gain.
entry_context.latest_profile_result: NVTX/Nsight evidence shows wrapper, sync, transform, and lifecycle cost dominate the accepted C++ MMAPI/VPI/NVENC device stage; P6/P7 queue-depth or double-buffering work is not triggered.
entry_context.current_blocker: No active quality, NvBuffer correctness, or Nsight profiling blocker.

allowed: EIS is the representative real-time vision workload, not the entire project identity
Regular gate quality and Challenge/diagnostic boundaries are separate claims
resid_r15_s07 is the accepted Regular-gate stabilization-strength recovery result
VPI CUDA PerspectiveWarp has module-level speed and perf-per-watt evidence at high resolution
The accepted C++ MMAPI/VPI/NVENC device path is a measured device-side dataflow stage
Format-matched NvBuffer pair is a quality-preserving dataflow alternative with small measured stage gains
forbidden: claiming a full real-time EIS product
claiming full-pipeline acceleration from module-only or stage-only evidence
claiming all-scene or product-grade EIS quality
using outdoor-car inverse or post-geometry smoke results as Regular05 EIS-quality evidence
using inclusion_source_to_dest or safe103_crop98 as the current stabilization-strength baseline
reopening limiter, R-radius, LP-weight, residual-strength, safe103, or inclusion sweeps for the accepted quality issue

verification.expected_result: JSON parses and harness doctor passes. The only untracked or modified non-project-entry change allowed outside this closeout is the user-updated oral template.

next_route_policy.default_next_action: Do not start another experiment by default. The current stage is sealed for presentation and interview use.
if_user_requests_more_engineering: Choose exactly one new scoped contract first.
Prefer a narrow wrapper/register/free/sync lifecycle A/B only if it preserves source, matrix, crop/postprocess, and output readability.
Alternative future routes are VPI Remap C++ official-sample probe, longer perf/watt run, or a small architecture diagram refresh.
Do not open broad C++ rewrites, mesh/grid warp, VPI optical flow, or quality tuning unless the user explicitly changes the objective.

stop_reasons: a required verification check fails and cannot be fixed locally
new experimental measurement would be required
editing would require copying internal/private material into public docs
